text:
Neon Genesis Evangelion II is the second soundtrack album released for the anime TV series Neon Genesis Evangelion. It was composed by Shirō Sagisu. The album was published by King Records via its label STARCHILD with the catalog number KICA-290. It was released on 16 February 1996. http://vgmdb.net/album/19789 The album was re-released as a DVD-Audio with catalog number KIAW-22 on 22 December 2004. http://vgmdb.net/album/23106 It was also re-released in Japan on 18 December 2013 as a remastered version called NEON GENESIS EVANGELION II [2013 HR Remaster Ver.] http://mora.jp/package/43000014/KICA290_F/ 
In North America, it was published by Geneon Entertainment with the catalog number 5225-2. It was released on 16 March 2004. https://vgmdb.net/album/19790 

The album peaked at number 4 on the Oricon albums chart, where it stayed for 15 weeks.
